column1: # This file seeds the perf-regression gate with plausible initial targets
# for a single-node NVMe appliance. The FIRST real nightly run replaces
# these numbers via a PR carrying the `perf-regression-ok` label (see
#   iops            — I/O operations per second (higher is better)
#   latency_ms_p99  — 99th-percentile latency in ms (LOWER is better)
# Metrics with the sentinel value 0 are ignored by compare.py for the
# row (not every test produces every metric).
